'''hazhapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:noctilucence|noctilucence]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:noctilucence|noctilucence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hazhapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzhæpæth|hæzhæpæth]] || [[word:hæzhæpæj|hæzhæpæj]] || [[word:hæzhæpæsh|hæzhæpæsh]] || [[word:hæzhæpæ|hæzhæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhazhapath|hazhazhapath]] || [[word:hazhazhapaj|hazhazhapaj]] || [[word:hazhazhapash|hazhazhapash]] || [[word:hazhazhapa|hazhazhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhapath|hazhapath]] || [[word:hazhapaj|hazhapaj]] || [[word:hazhapash|hazhapash]] || [[word:hazhapa|hazhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhafpath|hazhafpath]] || [[word:hazhafpaj|hazhafpaj]] || [[word:hazhafpash|hazhafpash]] || [[word:hazhafpaf|hazhafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazhapatha|hazhapatha]] || [[word:hazhapaja|hazhapaja]] || [[word:hazhapasha|hazhapasha]] || [[word:hazhapaka|hazhapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazhapath|hazhapath]] || [[word:hazhapaj|hazhapaj]] || [[word:hazhapash|hazhapash]] || [[word:hazhapa|hazhapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazhapathal|hazhapathal]] || [[word:hazhapajal|hazhapajal]] || [[word:hazhapashal|hazhapashal]] || [[word:hazhapakal|hazhapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazhapathatha|hazhapathatha]] || [[word:hazhapajaja|hazhapajaja]] || [[word:hazhapashasha|hazhapashasha]] || [[word:hazhapaka|hazhapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazhapathan|hazhapathan]] || [[word:hazhapajan|hazhapajan]] || [[word:hazhapashan|hazhapashan]] || [[word:hazhapakan|hazhapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazhapathaoro|hazhapathaoro]] || [[word:hazhapajaoro|hazhapajaoro]] || [[word:hazhapashaoro|hazhapashaoro]] || [[word:hazhapakaoro|hazhapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
